hero.name: Dr. Atoshe Islam
hero.tagline: Expert Dental Care You Can Trust
hero.description: Providing compassionate, state-of-the-art dental treatment at two convenient locations in Dhaka. Your smile is our priority.

about.title: About Dr. Atoshe Islam
about.subtitle: Committed to Your Oral Health
about.bio: Dr. Atoshe Islam is a highly qualified dental surgeon with a Bachelor of Dental Surgery (BDS) from the University of Dhaka and postgraduate training in Oral & Maxillofacial Surgery at Dhaka Dental College. With a deep commitment to patient comfort and cutting-edge techniques, Dr. Islam provides comprehensive dental care across two clinics in Dhaka.
about.qual2: PGT — Oral & Maxillofacial Surgery, Dhaka Dental College
about.expDesc: Years of hands-on experience in oral surgery, cosmetic dentistry, implantology, and general dental care. Trusted by hundreds of patients across Dhaka.
about.photoTodo: TODO: Replace with actual doctor photo

services.title: Our Services
services.subtitle: Comprehensive dental care under one roof

implants.name: Dental Implants
implants.desc: Permanent, natural-looking tooth replacements that restore function and confidence.

wisdom.name: Wisdom Tooth Extraction
wisdom.desc: Safe and comfortable removal of impacted or problematic wisdom teeth.

rootCanal.name: Root Canal Treatment
rootCanal.desc: Preserve your natural tooth by treating infected pulp with precision and care.

cosmetic.name: Cosmetic Dentistry
cosmetic.desc: Teeth whitening, veneers, and smile makeovers tailored to you.

oralSurgery.name: Oral & Maxillofacial Surgery
oralSurgery.desc: Expert surgical care for jaw, face, and mouth conditions.

checkup.name: Routine Checkup & Cleaning
checkup.desc: Regular examinations and professional cleaning to keep your teeth healthy.

whyUs.title: Why Choose Us
whyUs.subtitle: Patient safety and comfort are at the heart of everything we do

qualified.title: Qualified Oral Surgeon
qualified.desc: Dr. Islam holds specialized postgraduate training in Oral & Maxillofacial Surgery from Dhaka Dental College.

bmdc.title: BMDC Registered
bmdc.desc: Fully registered with the Bangladesh Medical & Dental Council (Reg. No: 16100) — your guarantee of professional standards.

sterilization.title: Strict Sterilization
sterilization.desc: We follow international infection-control protocols. All instruments are fully sterilized before every procedure.

comfort.title: Patient Comfort First
comfort.desc: We take time to explain every step. Pain management is a priority so you can relax in our care.

t1.name: Rahim Uddin
t1.text: Dr. Islam made my root canal completely pain-free. I was nervous but the team put me at ease immediately. Highly recommended!

t2.name: Nasreen Akter
t2.text: I had my wisdom tooth removed and the recovery was so smooth. The clinic is very clean and the doctor explained everything clearly.

t3.name: Shafiqul Islam
t3.text: Professional service and a genuine doctor. My whole family now visits Dr. Atoshe Islam for all dental needs.
